funFacts: Iguanodon was a large herbivore from the Early Cretaceous period, famous for its distinctive conical thumb spikes.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing contrasting color schemes using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
